name: Kyberion VTuber Narrated Demo
description: Produce a vtuber-style video that presents Kyberion as a live operator persona with on-air cues, chat, and demo beats.

context.voice_script: この動画では、Kyberion がライブの人格として brief を受け取り、オンエア感のある stage と chat を使ってデモを進める流れを示します。
context.hook_text: Kyberion は、ただ説明するだけではなく、オンエアで動く。
context.feature_text: persona を立て、会話の温度を保ち、画面上で demo と chat を往復します。
context.cta_text: 最後に、視聴者に向けた次のアクションを短く明示します。

params.cmd: command -v ffmpeg >/dev/null && command -v ffprobe >/dev/null && command -v say >/dev/null && test -f dist/libs/actuators/voice-actuator/src/index.js && test -f dist/libs/actuators/video-composition-actuator/src/index.js && echo ok

content.title: Kyberion VTuber: Persona, Demo, CTA
content.audience: operators and live viewers who want to see Kyberion presented as a responsive on-air persona
content.objective: convert a fixed live-demo brief into a renderable vtuber-style video package
content.promise: Kyberion can present itself as a live operator persona without losing the governed workflow
content.desired_takeaway: the viewer sees the persona, the demo, and the next action clearly
constraints: do not over-polish the live show feel

fixed_inputs.message: Kyberion narrates the work while the workflow stays auditable

video_content_brief.title: Kyberion VTuber: Persona, Demo, CTA
video_content_brief.audience: operators and live viewers who want to see Kyberion presented as a responsive on-air persona
video_content_brief.objective: convert a fixed live-demo brief into a renderable vtuber-style video package
video_content_brief.promise: Kyberion can present itself as a live operator persona without losing the governed workflow
video_content_brief.desired_takeaway: the viewer sees the persona, the demo, and the next action clearly
constraints: do not over-polish the live show feel

fixed_inputs.message: Kyberion narrates the work while the workflow stays auditable

params.cmd: if test -f {{video_output_path}}; then echo 'video already rendered'; else ffmpeg -y -f lavfi -i color=c=0x090814:s=640x360 -frames:v 1 -update 1 {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-cover.png && ffmpeg -y -loop 1 -framerate 25 -i {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-cover.png -t 6 -c:v libx264 -preset ultrafast -crf 35 -pix_fmt yuv420p {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-vtuber-silent.mp4 && ffmpeg -y -i {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-vtuber-silent.mp4 -i {{narration_path}} -c:v copy -c:a aac -t 6 -movflags +faststart {{video_output_path}}; fi

test -f {{narration_path}} || { echo 'missing narration artifact: {{narration_path}}'; exit 1; } && test -f {{video_output_path}} || { echo 'missing video artifact: {{video_output_path}}'; exit 1; } && test -f {{video_bundle_dir}}/index.html || { echo 'missing video bundle index: {{video_bundle_dir}}/index.html'; exit 1; } && test -f {{video_bundle_dir}}/render-plan.json || { echo 'missing video bundle render plan: {{video_bundle_dir}}/render-plan.json'; exit 1; } && test -n "$(ffprobe -v error -select_streams a:0 -show_entries stream=index -of csv=p=0 {{video_output_path}})" || { echo 'missing audio stream in rendered video'; exit 1; } && echo 'outputs verified with audio-muxed mp4'

mkdir -p {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-vtuber-frames && ffmpeg -y -i {{video_output_path}} -vf "select='eq(n,0)'" -vframes 1 {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-vtuber-frames/frame-000.png && ffmpeg -y -ss 00:00:07 -i {{video_output_path}} -vframes 1 {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-vtuber-frames/frame-001.png && ffmpeg -y -ss 00:00:13 -i {{video_output_path}} -vframes 1 {{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-vtuber-frames/frame-002.png && echo 'key frames extracted'

if ffmpeg -hide_banner -i {{video_output_path}} -vf blackdetect=d=0.5:pic_th=0.98:pix_th=0.10 -an -f null - 2>&1 | grep -q 'black_start'; then echo 'black frame detected'; exit 1; fi && echo 'black-frame check passed'

video_duration=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of default=nw=1:nk=1 {{video_output_path}}) && audio_duration=$(ffprobe -v error -show_entries format=duration -of default=nw=1:nk=1 {{narration_path}}) && awk -v v="$video_duration" -v a="$audio_duration" 'BEGIN { diff = v - a; if (diff < 0) diff = -diff; if (diff > 1.0) { printf("duration mismatch: video=%s audio=%s\n", v, a); exit 1; } printf("duration aligned: video=%s audio=%s\n", v, a); }'

params.content:
# Kyberion VTuber Narrated Demo

## Scenario flow
1. Receive a fixed live-demo brief with persona, chat, and workflow already decided.
2. Convert the brief into a vtuber-oriented content brief and storyboard.
3. Generate narration and compose the scene bundle.
4. Render, verify, extract key frames, and reject black-frame output.

## Output artifacts
- Content brief: `{{content_brief_path}}`
- Narration: `{{narration_path}}`
- Video: `{{video_output_path}}`
- Bundle: `{{video_bundle_dir}}`
- Key frames: `{{mission_evidence_dir}}/kyberion-vtuber-frames/`

## Validation
- `{{preflight_result}}`
- `{{voice_result}}`
- `{{video_result}}`
- `{{verify_result}}`
- `{{frame_extract_result}}`
- `{{blackframe_result}}`
- `{{duration_alignment_result}}`

## Next command
- `pnpm pipeline --input pipelines/kyberion-vtuber-narrated-demo.json`

params.message: 🏁 [KYBERION-VTUBER] Narrated demo complete. Voice: {{voice_result}} Video: {{video_result}} Verify: {{verify_result}}
